name: shuhe-work-skills
description: 数禾工作场景Skills集合 + oh-my-claudecode 完整工具链
author: 数禾DS团队

skills.name: guanyuan-data-fetcher
skills.description: 自动化观远数据平台查询和报告生成 - 支持卡片查询、指标获取、Excel报告生成

skills.name: guanyuan-monitor
skills.description: [PROTOTYPE] 自动化观远数据监控系统 - 支持基于规则的告警判断、钉钉通知、定时任务调度

skills.name: rta-exclude-strategy
skills.description: RTA排除策略分析 - 双算法(贪心+ILP)+多目标优化+Uplift因果推断+PSI稳定性+自动分箱+批量回测

skills.name: ai-slop-cleaner
skills.description: Clean AI-generated code slop with a regression-safe, deletion-first workflow

skills.name: ask
skills.description: Process-first advisor routing for Claude, Codex, or Gemini via omc ask

skills.name: autopilot
skills.description: Full autonomous execution from idea to working code

skills.name: cancel
skills.description: Cancel any active OMC mode

skills.name: ccg
skills.description: Claude-Codex-Gemini tri-model orchestration

skills.name: configure-notifications
skills.description: Configure notification integrations (Telegram, Discord, Slack)

skills.name: deep-dive
skills.description: 2-stage pipeline: trace + deep-interview for requirements crystallization

skills.name: deepinit
skills.description: Deep codebase initialization with hierarchical AGENTS.md documentation

skills.name: deep-interview
skills.description: Socratic deep interview with mathematical ambiguity gating

skills.name: external-context
skills.description: Invoke parallel document-specialist agents for external searches

skills.name: hud
skills.description: Configure HUD display options

skills.name: learner
skills.description: Extract a learned skill from the current conversation

skills.name: mcp-setup
skills.description: Configure popular MCP servers for enhanced agent capabilities

skills.name: omc-doctor
skills.description: Diagnose and fix oh-my-claudecode installation issues

skills.name: omc-reference
skills.description: OMC agent catalog, tools, team pipeline routing, and skills registry

skills.name: omc-setup
skills.description: Install or refresh oh-my-claudecode

skills.name: omc-teams
skills.description: CLI-team runtime for claude, codex, or gemini workers in tmux panes

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Strategic planning with optional interview workflow

skills.name: project-session-manager
skills.description: Worktree-first dev environment manager for issues, PRs, and features

skills.name: ralph
skills.description: Self-referential loop until task completion with configurable verification

skills.name: ralplan
skills.description: Consensus planning entrypoint that auto-gates vague requests

skills.name: release
skills.description: Automated release workflow for oh-my-claudecode

skills.name: sciomc
skills.description: Orchestrate parallel scientist agents for comprehensive analysis

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Install/update routing - sends setup, doctor, or MCP requests to correct flow

skills.name: skill
skills.description: Manage local skills - list, add, remove, search, edit, setup wizard

skills.name: team
skills.description: N coordinated agents on shared task list using Claude Code native teams

skills.name: trace
skills.description: Evidence-driven tracing lane with competing tracer hypotheses

skills.name: ultraqa
skills.description: QA cycling workflow - test, verify, fix, repeat until goal met

skills.name: ultrawork
skills.description: Parallel execution engine for high-throughput task completion

skills.name: visual-verdict
skills.description: Structured visual QA verdict for screenshot-to-reference comparisons

skills.name: writer-memory
skills.description: Agentic memory system for writers - track characters, relationships, scenes

skills.name: sql-optimizer
skills.description: Optimize and clean SQL queries with structured comments, format improvements, and syntax validation

skills.name: sql-runner
skills.description: Execute optimized SQL files using Dataphin MCP tools with automatic polling and result management

skills.name: html-report-framework
skills.description: HTML 报告生成通用框架 - ECharts 图表、动态居中布局、可折叠侧栏、规则驱动结论、f-string 模板

skills.name: monthly-report-html-generator
skills.description: 从数据源自动生成月度运营数据 HTML 报告，支持 ECharts 图表、规则驱动结论、可折叠侧栏导航

skills.name: skill-governance
skills.description: Skills 库治理规范 - 新增、更新、删除 skill 的强制性守门流程

skills.name: claude-dir-governance
skills.description: .claude 目录配置治理和性能优化规范

skills.name: skill-lifecycle-manager
skills.description: Skills 生命周期管理器 - 版本管理、依赖检查、使用统计、健康报告

skills.name: skill-auto-evolver
skills.description: Skills 自动进化器 - 性能监控、自动优化、A/B测试、版本迭代

skills.name: self-improving-agent
skills.description: A universal self-improving agent that learns from ALL skill experiences. Uses multi-memory architecture to continuously evolve the codebase.

skills.name: skill-vetter
skills.description: Security-first vetting for OpenClaw skills. Checks for red flags, permission scope, and suspicious patterns before installation.
